case_title: RODERICK VIZCO VS. FERNANDO'S COLLISION & RESTORATION LLC A

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF VIZCO, RODERICK AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDO'S COLLISION & RESTORATION  LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VIZCO, RODERICK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FERNANDO'S COLLISION & RESTORATION  LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $4,557.71 PRINCIPAL, $6.92 INTEREST, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,764.63, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
